steps.title: Close the dash phrase
steps.content: The dash after "that" opens the supplementary phrase "assuming solar panel installers' cooperation." The blank must close that phrase before the main clause resumes with "this practice has the potential to increase." A matching dash is needed.

steps.title: Rule out mismatched punctuation
steps.content: Choice A closes the phrase with a comma, and Choice C closes it with a colon; neither can pair with the opening dash. Choice D leaves the supplementary phrase unclosed. The sentence needs a second dash before "this." The answer is B.
